heading: Denial of applications; finality of decision
label: 1220c Denial of applications; finality of decision
text: A decision by the Secretary denying any application for a obsolete ship under this chapter is final.1So in original. Probably should be “an”.1
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “obsolete ship” for “Liberty ship”.Pub. L. 98–623
amendments: Amendments1984— substituted “obsolete ship” for “Liberty ship”.Pub. L. 98–623
